features.description: The home route renders the full portfolio shell with nav, hero, projects, about, and footer.
steps: Verify the navigation, hero, projects, about, and footer sections render in order
Verify the main content is reachable from the skip link and section anchors

features.description: The navigation supports hash links and mobile menu interaction.
steps: Open the home page on desktop and mobile widths
Verify the nav links target the expected sections
Verify the mobile menu opens and closes

features.description: Project cards render the project list with images, tags, and outbound links.
steps: Verify each project card shows title, description, tags, and link actions
Verify external links open the expected destinations

features.description: The 404 page offers a clear recovery path back to the home page.
steps: Verify the return-to-home button points back to the root route
